description: Materialize a slice of a TM1 cube via MDX as a Dagster DataFrame asset. Two modes: (1) explicit MDX statement executed via /ExecuteMDX, or (2) simplified cube + row_dimensions + column_dimensions + filters, from which an MDX is generated. Foundation for TM1 → warehouse / dbt / dashboards.

asset_key.label: Asset Key
asset_key.description: Asset key for the emitted DataFrame.

mdx.label: MDX
mdx.description: Explicit MDX statement. If set, row/column/filter fields are ignored.

row_dimensions.label: Row Dimensions
row_dimensions.description: Simplified mode: dimensions on the row axis.

column_dimensions.label: Column Dimensions
column_dimensions.description: Simplified mode: dimensions on the column axis.
